channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: A new regional order for the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The GCC and Iran can come up with a new security architecture for the Strait of Hormuz that can give Trump an off-ramp.

item.title: Vietnam’s gig workers slammed by rising fuel costs amid fallout of Iran war
item.description: Diesel prices have more than doubled in the Southeast Asian nation amid Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran rejects Trump’s Hormuz deadline; 2 killed in Haifa
item.description: Iranian officials dismiss Trump's ultimatum, condemn latest threats as 'incitement to war crimes'.

item.title: Has the humanitarian crisis in Gaza been ignored?
item.description: Conditions in Gaza worsen amid the United States-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Israeli air strike hits crowd in Gaza City
item.description: Several Palestinians were rushed to hospital with severe injuries after an Israeli air strike hit a crowd in Gaza City.

item.title: Trump threatens Iran in expletive-filled social media post
item.description: Donald Trump unleashed a vulgar online tirade against Iran’s leaders as his deadline for reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Israel continues deadly attacks on Gaza while striking Iran, Lebanon
item.description: Israel has kept up its attacks on Gaza while striking Iran and Lebanon, killing at least four Palestinians on Sunday.

item.title: Frustration grows as Iran’s wartime internet shutdown breaks grim record
item.description: Since January, Iran's near total internet blackout has impacted jobs and businesses.

item.title: Video captures Iranian missile striking residential building in Haifa
item.description: Video captured the moment of a direct hit by an Iranian missile on a residential building in Israel’s Haifa.

item.title: Israeli air strikes, shelling across Lebanon add to rising death toll
item.description: Widespread Israeli attacks pounded Lebanon from Beirut to Tyre on Sunday, adding to a rising death toll.
